summary: Agent was tasked with adding a `retryWithBackoff` utility function to `src/utils/shell-test-runner.ts` with exponential backoff retry logic (max 3 attempts, 500ms base delay, 2x multiplier) and corresponding tests. Agent attempted to read existing code but discovered a tool constraint: the 'Analyze Code' workflow step only permits read/search/analyze tools, but the available tools (test_runner, file_write, file_edit) fall into execute/write categories. Agent correctly identified this constraint but did not resolve the task before session ended. The attempt was marked as successful despite being incomplete.

decisions.description: Attempted to use test_runner tool to explore codebase when file_read was unavailable
decisions.rationale: Agent needed to understand existing code structure before implementing the utility function, and test_runner was the only executable tool available

decisions.description: Halted execution upon discovering tool category mismatch
decisions.rationale: Agent recognized that test_runner (execute category) and file_write/file_edit (write category) violate the 'Analyze Code' workflow step constraints which only allow read/search/analyze tools

rejected_ideas.idea: Use test_runner to execute npm test or shell commands for code inspection
rejected_ideas.reason: test_runner falls under 'execute' category which is not permitted during the 'Analyze Code' workflow step

rejected_ideas.idea: Proceed with file_write or file_edit to implement the function
rejected_ideas.reason: These tools fall under 'write' category which is not permitted during the 'Analyze Code' workflow step

risks.description: Tool availability mismatch: workflow step constraints prevent access to necessary tools for task completion
risks.mitigation: Workflow definition needs to include read/search/analyze tools in the 'Analyze Code' step, or step permissions need revision

risks.description: Task completion status marked as successful despite being incomplete
risks.mitigation: Clarify what constitutes 'success' - identifying a blocker may not be equivalent to task completion

open_threads.context: Cannot proceed without ability to read existing code in src/utils/shell-test-runner.ts. Requires file_read or equivalent read tool in 'Analyze Code' workflow step
Depends on completion of utility function implementation. Test file location: tests/utils/shell-test-runner.test.ts
npm test needs to be executed in 'Execute' workflow step after implementation is complete
